sections.title: Core Extraction Rules
items: route by project type before implementation starts
choose one primary reference source first
prefer a modular monolith before splitting into services
make security, testing, observability, and release rules part of the reference system
preserve system design knowledge as a learning library

sections.title: Duplicate Analysis Guardrails
items: compare the reference against the central capability map
reuse existing Kabeeri capability names instead of inventing duplicates
treat the source package as temporary until redistribution is complete
move only missing gaps into permanent folders
keep traceability in reports and permanent knowledge folders
